console.params_save_confirm: Saving params will restart ComfyUI, continue?
console.params_restart_hint: Changes to launch parameters take effect only after ComfyUI restarts.
console.params_restart_toast: ComfyUI is restarting with new params...

vram.label: VRAM Management
vram.help: Controls model VRAM allocation strategy. Default auto-detects the best mode. High VRAM suits large-memory GPUs, while Low VRAM helps on smaller GPUs.

attention.label: Attention Mode
attention.help: PyTorch SDPA is the recommended default and automatically picks an efficient kernel. FlashAttention and SageAttention can be installed in Setup Wizard.

disable_xformers.label: xFormers
disable_xformers.help: With newer PyTorch versions, PyTorch SDPA is usually preferred. Keep xFormers disabled unless you specifically need it.

unet_precision.label: UNet Precision
unet_precision.help: Controls UNet inference precision. FP8 can significantly reduce VRAM usage, while BF16 is recommended on Ampere and newer GPUs.

vae_precision.label: VAE Precision
vae_precision.help: Controls VAE decoding precision. FP32 is the safest, while FP16/BF16 are faster. If you get black images, try switching back to FP32.

text_enc_precision.label: Text Encoder Precision
text_enc_precision.help: Controls text encoder precision. Default is usually fine, while FP8 can save additional VRAM.

fast.label: Experimental Optimization
fast.help: Enables ComfyUI experimental acceleration. It may improve speed, but a small number of workflows could be incompatible.

preview_method.label: Preview Method
preview_method.help: Controls real-time previews during generation. TAESD looks better but is slightly slower; Latent2RGB is faster but blurrier.

cache.label: Cache Strategy
cache.help: Controls node output caching. The LRU Cache Size setting below only takes effect when this is set to LRU. Classic mode is more aggressive and faster, but uses more memory.

cache_lru_size.label: LRU Cache Size
cache_lru_size.help: Sets how many node results can be retained for reuse. Higher values can improve reuse across repeated runs, but consume more memory. Only applies when Cache Strategy is set to LRU.

settings.no_git: ComfyUI is not a git repository. Version management is unavailable.
settings.switch_confirm: Switch ComfyUI to {version}? This will restart ComfyUI.
settings.switch_confirm_nightly: Switch to nightly (master)? This is a development version and may be unstable.
